headline: Protect today, stay ahead, catch up later
summary: Today is your snacking weakness day: one weak Saturday undoes a week of progress—block it with movement and portion control.
details: You're currently losing -0.81 kg/week, faster than the -0.57 kg/week you need, but 146 days behind means you can't afford weekend sabotage. Eat only Huel and vegetables today—zero discretionary snacking—then hit 45 minutes on the rowing machine to burn through the emotional triggers. Seven Saturdays of discipline like today is the difference between 88 kg goal and another year of regret.
